title: Need to block access to kernel file systems in /proc and /sys
body:
Users of kpod run could use these file systems to perform a breakout
or to learn valuable system information.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM, but you're getting test failures on Cent 7.

:pushpin: Commit cc18ae9 has been approved by `mheon`

:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
